name: Squash-Corn Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 Or 4 zucchini (or yellow summer squash) sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sliced zucchini, whole kernel corn, chopped onion, and chopped jalapeno pepper.
2. Add salt to taste.
3. Cook or steam the mixture until tender.
4. Drain any excess liquid.
5. Top with 3/4 cup grated cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 10 minutes.
